data.body: CHECKPOINT: Step 3 complete. Wrote 5 failing tests in TestRedBeforeFixGate class in tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill.py. All 5 confirmed RED. Tests verify: (1) gate present, (2) gate blocks fix without RED test, (3) gate requires confirmed failing test, (4) gate exempts mechanical bugs, (5) gate positioned between Step 5 and Step 6. Now implementing the gate in SKILL.md.
